questionHtml: Identify the splitting pattern of the signal of the hydrogen atoms on the circled carbon atoms in 2-bromobutane.
markschemeHtml:
Splitting pattern of the signal of the hydrogen atoms in circle A:

doublet ✔

 

Splitting pattern of the signal of the hydrogen atoms in circle B:

triplet ✔

meta.title: Identify the splitting pattern of the signal of the hydrogen atoms on the circled carbon atoms in 2-bromobutane.
